Operation 'updateMaster' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too vague about what properties can be modified and what the operation returns. Added clarity about required ID parameter, request body expectations, return value, and partial update support to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Modifies an existing master file's properties.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing master file's properties. Requires the master file ID as a path parameter. Specify which properties to modify in the request body. Returns the updated master file object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague about what properties can be modified and what the operation returns. Added clarity about required ID parameter, request body expectations, return value, and partial update support to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteMaster' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks important details about the destructive nature of the operation, required parameters, return value, and cascading effects. Added information about ID requirement, permanence, success response, and side effects (removal of associated files and transactions) for better AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a master file record and its associated data. Requires the master file ID as a path parameter. This operation is permanent and cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation. All attached files and transactions associated with this master will also be removed.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks important details about the destructive nature of the operation, required parameters, return value, and cascading effects. Added information about ID requirement, permanence, success response, and side effects (removal of associated files and transactions) for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'uploadMasterFile' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description specifies supported formats but lacks details about required inputs (master ID), return value, and the role of the uploaded file in the watermarking workflow. Added clarity on input requirements, response structure, and operational context for AI agents.

data.current_summary: Upload a file to a master
data.current_description: Attach an ebook file (EPUB, MOBI, or PDF) to a master record.
data.description_suggestion: Attaches an ebook file (EPUB, MOBI, or PDF) to a master record. Requires the master file ID and the ebook file in the request. Returns the created master file attachment object with metadata including file ID, format, and upload timestamp. The uploaded file becomes the source for watermarked ebook generation.
data.reasoning: Current description specifies supported formats but lacks details about required inputs (master ID), return value, and the role of the uploaded file in the watermarking workflow. Added clarity on input requirements, response structure, and operational context for AI agents.

message: Operation 'updateMasterFile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is vague about what metadata can be updated and what the operation returns. Added clarity about the ID parameter requirement, scope of updates (metadata only, not file content), and return value to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Update file metadata for an attached file.
data.description_suggestion: Updates metadata for an attached ebook file. Requires the master file attachment ID as a path parameter. Modifiable metadata may include file name, description, or other properties. Returns the updated master file attachment object. This operation does not replace the actual file content.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what metadata can be updated and what the operation returns. Added clarity about the ID parameter requirement, scope of updates (metadata only, not file content), and return value to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Remove an attached file from a master record.
data.description_suggestion: Removes an attached ebook file from a master record. Requires the master file attachment ID as a path parameter. This operation is permanent and cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation. Any pending or future watermarking transactions using this file will fail until a new file is attached.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks important details about the ID parameter, permanence of deletion, return value, and side effects on dependent transactions. Added information about required parameters, destructive nature, success response, and impact on watermarking operations for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createTransaction' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description explains the watermarking options but lacks details about required inputs (TransactionRequest schema), return value structure, and asynchronous processing behavior. Added clarity on input requirements, mutual exclusivity of watermark options, response contents, and processing expectations for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Generate a watermarked version of an ebook. Use either watermark_value for direct text or watermark_params for template interpolation.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a watermarked version of an ebook from a master file. Requires a TransactionRequest containing the master file ID and watermark information. Specify watermark_value for direct text watermarking or watermark_params for template-based interpolation (use one or the other, not both). Returns a TransactionResponse with the watermarked ebook download URL, transaction ID, and metadata. The watermarked file is generated asynchronously and may take time to complete.
data.reasoning: Current description explains the watermarking options but lacks details about required inputs (TransactionRequest schema), return value structure, and asynchronous processing behavior. Added clarity on input requirements, mutual exclusivity of watermark options, response contents, and processing expectations for better AI agent interpretability.
